models.label: Llama 3 8B
models.description: Fast everyday model. Good for writing, Q&A, summarizing, and simple tasks.

models.label: Llama 3.1 70B
models.description: Powerful all-rounder. Best for complex questions, long documents, and in-depth explanations.

models.label: Mistral 7B
models.description: Lightweight and precise. Great for quick structured answers and formatting tasks.

models.label: Qwen 2.5 72B
models.description: Top pick for code. Excels at multi-language programming, debugging, and technical analysis.

models.label: DeepSeek R1 7B
models.description: Chain-of-thought reasoner. Best for math, logic problems, and step-by-step debugging.

models.label: Llama 3.2 11B Vision
models.description: Reads images. Send photos, screenshots, or diagrams alongside your question.

models.label: Llama 3.2 90B Vision
models.description: Advanced vision. Best for detailed image analysis, charts, and technical drawings.
